title: Dungeon & Harvest：工業奇境
description: This is a modpack that combines RPG dungeon adventures, Farmer's delight, and Create industrial automation.
body:
# Dungeon & Harvest｜工業奇境

A lightweight modpack that combines dungeon exploration, farming, and industrial automation.

融合 RPG 地下城探險、慢活農業與工業自動化的輕量整合包。

---

## 🌾 Farming & Cooking｜農業與料理

Build your own farm, raise animals, and cook delicious meals.

打造自己的農場、飼養牲畜並製作各種料理。

With Farmer's Delight and related addons, you can enjoy a relaxing countryside lifestyle.

透過 Farmer's Delight 與相關擴充模組，享受悠閒的田園生活。

---

## ⚙️ Create Automation｜Create 自動化工業

Design automated farms, factories, and transportation systems.

建造自動農場、生產線與物流系統。

From simple machines to complex industrial projects, every gear has a purpose.

從簡單機械到大型工廠，讓每個齒輪都發揮價值。

---

## 🏰 Dungeon Adventures｜地下城冒險

Explore dungeons, defeat bosses, and discover rare treasures.

探索地下城、挑戰 Boss 並獲得稀有戰利品。

Every expedition brings new challenges and opportunities.

每一次探險都可能帶來新的挑戰與收穫。

---

## ✨ Perfect For｜適合哪些玩家？

✔ Players who enjoy Create automation
✔ 喜歡 Create 自動化的玩家

✔ Players who love farming and cooking
✔ 喜歡種田與料理的玩家

✔ Players who want dungeon exploration and RPG progression
✔ 喜歡探索地下城與 RPG 成長的玩家

✔ Small groups of friends with different playstyles
✔ 想和朋友一起遊玩的玩家

---

## 📦 Features｜特色

* Lightweight modpack｜輕量化整合包
* Multiplayer friendly｜多人遊玩友善
* Create automation｜Create 工業自動化
* Farmer's Delight cooking｜Farmer's Delight 料理系統
* Dungeon exploration｜地下城探索
* RPG combat｜RPG 戰鬥體驗
* Fabric 1.20.1
